title: festuca restituta
intro: Festuca restituta, commonly known as blue fescue, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. This perennial grass has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Festuca restituta include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a natural remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Festuca restituta include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and internally to promote overall well-being.
